plist.dict:
CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleName {{.Info.ProductName}} CFBundleExecutable {{.OutputFilename}} CFBundleIdentifier xyz.firstlayer.facet CFBundleVersion {{.Info.ProductVersion}} CFBundleGetInfoString {{.Info.Comments}} CFBundleShortVersionString {{.Info.ProductVersion}} CFBundleIconFile iconfile LSMinimumSystemVersion 10.13.0 NSHighResolutionCapable true LSMultipleInstancesProhibited
NSHumanReadableCopyright {{.Info.Copyright}} NSCameraUsageDescription Facet uses the camera for head tracking to create a 3D parallax effect in the viewport. CFBundleDocumentTypes
CFBundleTypeName Facet Model CFBundleTypeRole Editor LSHandlerRank Owner LSItemContentTypes
xyz.firstlayer.facet.fct
CFBundleTypeIconFile iconfile
UTExportedTypeDeclarations
UTTypeIdentifier xyz.firstlayer.facet.fct UTTypeDescription Facet Model UTTypeConformsTo
public.data
UTTypeIconFile iconfile UTTypeTagSpecification
public.filename-extension
fct
public.mime-type
text/x-facet
UTImportedTypeDeclarations
UTTypeIdentifierxyz.firstlayer.facet.stl UTTypeDescriptionSTL Mesh UTTypeConformsTo public.datapublic.3d-content UTTypeTagSpecification
public.filename-extensionstl public.mime-typemodel/stl
UTTypeIdentifierxyz.firstlayer.facet.obj UTTypeDescriptionWavefront OBJ Mesh UTTypeConformsTo public.datapublic.3d-content UTTypeTagSpecification
public.filename-extensionobj public.mime-typemodel/obj
UTTypeIdentifierxyz.firstlayer.facet.3mf UTTypeDescription3MF Mesh UTTypeConformsTo public.datapublic.3d-content UTTypeTagSpecification
public.filename-extension3mf public.mime-type
model/3mf application/vnd.ms-package.3dmanufacturing-3dmodel+xml
{{if .Info.Protocols}} CFBundleURLTypes
{{range .Info.Protocols}}
CFBundleURLName xyz.firstlayer.{{.Scheme}} CFBundleURLSchemes
{{.Scheme}}
CFBundleTypeRole {{.Role}}
{{end}}
{{end}}
